title: Unsafe JSON Parsing in API Responses
essence: JSON.parse() calls without try/catch can crash the application on malformed responses
symptoms: Application crashes on API response parsing
repro_steps: Trigger API call that returns malformed JSON
Observe application crash or white screen
Check console for JSON parsing errors
Verify no error handling around JSON.parse()
root_cause: Direct JSON.parse() calls without validation or error handling for malformed API responses
do_not_do: Assume API responses are always valid JSON
guardrails: Provide fallback values for parsing failures
prevent_tests: Verify error handling for invalid responses
Check application stability during parsing errors

evidence.notes: Critical stability issue - can cause complete application failure
